summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Unified Product Options system - All 6 features verified working correctly. Backend APIs pass 14/14 tests. Frontend UI shows all Product Group Context Selectors and Visibility toggles as implemented.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All unified product options features are working. Session expiry is known issue - re-login if needed.

1_product_group_selector_nav_structure.details: Working on: dropdown with Tiles, Flooring, Underfloor Heating, Materials, Tools, Accessories options visible in Filters tab
1_product_group_selector_nav_structure.evidence: Screenshot shows 'Working on: Tiles' dropdown with 'Showing filters for: Tiles' badge

2_product_group_selector_bulk_editor.details: Bulk Category Editor modal shows 'Working on:' dropdown with All Groups, Tiles, Underfloor Heating, Flooring, Materials, Tools options
2_product_group_selector_bulk_editor.evidence: Screenshot shows 'Showing options for: Tiles' badge in modal

3_product_group_selector_manage_options.details: Manage Product Options modal has Product Group selector with All Groups, Tiles, Underfloor Heating, Flooring, Materials, Tools, Accessories
3_product_group_selector_manage_options.evidence: Screenshot shows 'Showing options relevant to Tiles' text and category tabs

4_visibility_toggles_filter_edit.details: Add/Edit Filter dialog has 'Visibility & Integration' section with 4 checkboxes: Show in Shop Filters, Show in Bulk Editor, Show on Product Page, Allow Adding in Bulk Editor
4_visibility_toggles_filter_edit.evidence: Screenshot shows all 4 toggles with sync message: 'These settings sync with the Bulk Category Editor's Manage Options system'

5_options_sync_between_systems.details: Manage Options modal shows sync message: 'Changes sync with Navigation & Structure and Product Edit pages'
5_options_sync_between_systems.evidence: Add/Edit/Delete buttons visible for each option (Porcelain, Ceramic, Natural Stone, Marble, etc.)

6_backend_api_endpoints.evidence: 14/14 pytest tests passed including bulk-editor-options and delete endpoint tests
